validations.min: %{field} 字段至少需要 %{min} 个字符
validations.alpha_dash: The %{field} field may contain alpha-numeric characters as well as dashes and underscores
validations.email: %{field} 字段必须是有效的电子邮件地址
validations.between: %{field} 字段必须在 %{min} 和 %{max} 之间
validations.min_value: %{field} 字段必须为 %{min} 或更多
